src/main/java/com/warehouse/controller/D.general_idea: Remove redundant @Autowired annotation from constructor-based dependency injection.

src/main/java/com/warehouse/controller/U.general_idea: Remove unused @Autowired import and annotation to align with Spring Boot 3.x constructor injection best practices.

src/main/java/com/warehouse/mapper/Payme.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
src/main/java/com/warehouse/mapper/Payme.why_exists: List.get(0) is not removed in Java 21, but the migration recipe enforces the use of the new API; this is a polishment change as the old code still compiles and runs.

src/main/java/com/warehouse/service/Mail.general_idea: Remove @Autowired annotation from constructor to rely on Spring's implicit single-constructor injection.

src/main/java/com/warehouse/service/Paym.general_idea: Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15 for cleaner string interpolation.

src/test/java/com/warehouse/mvc/DepotMvc.general_idea: Remove unused static import for Mockito mock method.
